detach_procedure: same-directory temp copy; preserve owner/mode; verify SHA, regular-file, and nlink=1; atomic mv -T to worker_path
rollback_procedure: copy hardlink_alias to same-directory temp; verify SHA, owner/mode, and nlink=1; atomic mv -T to worker_path
process_boundary: running process retains old inode; next service start reads worker_path new inode
